title: Bill Burr Live from the SiriusXM Garage

It was an electric. No, it was not because it was built in 1952. Okay. But yes. That was great. It was fun, but it's time to move into the future. It is. Yeah.

Electric vehicles. Chevy is all over it. Chevy has EVs. That's what I call electric vehicles. EVs for everyone. I coined that phrase. No, you didn't. They make electric vehicles for every kind of life stage and every kind of budget.
